title: ilex cassine subsp. myrtifolia
intro: Ilex cassine subsp. myrtifolia, also known as Southern Holly, is a subspecies of the American holly plant, native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Ilex cassine subsp. myrtifolia include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various ailments.
